Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Dawn Valdivia, Esq. appeared for plaintiff US EXPO & Convention Services.
Maura Palmero, President/Owner of US EXPO & Convention Services, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Miranet, LLC or William Seeley.
Amended Defaults entered against defendants on May 28, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff US EXPO & Convention Services, and against the Defaulted Defendants Miranet, LLC and William Seeley as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,968.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,169.49.
Attorney's Fees - $8,909.00.
Costs - 487.50.
Travel Expenses for plaintiff and attorney - $738.00, for a total of $58,272.53.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Continued To Sep-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc And Motion To Appear Pro Hac Vice (Dawn C Valdivia)
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Text Ruling
